name: Miao Gateway
description: Miao Chat channel gateway connector plugin (register/heartbeat/reconnect/invoke).

enabled.description: Enable gateway client service. Default: true

displayName.description: Readable channel name shown in App, e.g. My Mac Mini

deviceId.description: Device id shown on backend status

capabilities.description: Capabilities exposed to backend, e.g. stream/file-input/file-output

channelTags.description: Optional tags for filtering or diagnostics, e.g. local/mac/gpu

registerToken.description: Optional register token for gateway auth

queueWaitTimeoutMs.description: Max wait time in queue before fail (ms). Default: 60000

streamBubbleSplitGapMs.description: Split assistant bubbles when stream gap exceeds this threshold (ms). Default: 4000

openclawGatewayUrl.description: Local OpenClaw gateway URL, default ws://127.0.0.1:18789

openclawSessionKey.description: Session namespace prefix for chat.send; actual key becomes <prefix>:conv:<conversationId>
